title: Polymates app-shell MVP
goal: Turn Polymates from a starter/landing page into a convincing product MVP for collaborative Polymarket tracking.
successCriteria: Product is an app shell, not a starter page
Core surfaces exist: watchlist, market detail, catalysts, friend activity, and thesis tracking
UI feels coherent and demoable on desktop and mobile
Repo is isolated enough to commit and push cleanly

approvalRequiredFor: new external accounts/services beyond GitHub push
constraints.runtimePreference: continue until done or truly blocked

completed: Replaced starter with first-pass concept landing page
Upgraded to app-shell MVP with watchlist, market detail, catalysts, friend takes, and activity feed
state.currentStep: Isolate Polymates as its own repo and push it
state.nextStep: Initialize repo, commit MVP, create GitHub repo, push

stopConditions: Build cannot be restored in bounded time
